headline: 1 S&P 500 Stock on Our Buy List and 2 We Avoid
summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) is home to the biggest and most well-known companies in the market, making it a go-to index for investors seeking stability. But not all large-cap stocks are created equal - some are struggling with slowing growth, declining margins, or increased competition.

headline: Shares of companies in the broader financial sector are trading lower amid overall market weakness, as investors react to reports that air defenses were activated in Tehran and to President Trump's social media post.
